= Contents =
  - [[#FFMPEG|FFMPEG]]
      - [[#FFMPEG#conversion|conversion]]
        - [[#FFMPEG#conversion#concat|concat]]
        - [[#FFMPEG#conversion#parallel|parallel]]
        - [[#FFMPEG#conversion#remove audio|remove audio]]
      - [[#FFMPEG#info|info]]
        - [[#FFMPEG#info#bitrate|bitrate]]
      - [[#FFMPEG#generate|generate]]
        - [[#FFMPEG#generate#color noise|color noise]]
        - [[#FFMPEG#generate#monochrome noise|monochrome noise]]

= FFMPEG =

=== conversion ===

==== concat ====
prepare list of files::
{{{
   file '1.mp4'
   file '2.mp4'
   . . .
}}}
run::
`ffmpeg -f concat -i list -c copy output`

==== parallel ====
{{{
  find $path -name ... | parallel ffmpeg -i {} -y <filters> .{}.new
}}}
* `parallel` - GNU parallel
* output format:
  * {} - same name and path as input
  * {.} - same path and name w/o extension

==== remove audio ====
{{{
  ffmpeg -i input -c copy -an output
}}}

=== info ===

==== bitrate ====
{{{
  ffprobe -v error -select_streams a:0  -show_entries stream=bit_rate -of default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1 
}}}

=== generate ===

==== color noise ====
{{{
  ffmpeg -f rawvideo -video_size 1280x720 -pixel_format yuv420p -framerate 25 \
  -i /dev/urandom -ar 48000 -ac 2 -f s16le -i /dev/urandom -codec:a copy \
  -t 5 -vf hue=s=0 output
}}}
==== monochrome noise ====
{{{
  ffmpeg -f rawvideo -video_size 1280x720 -pixel_format yuv420p -framerate 25 \
  -i /dev/urandom -ar 48000 -ac 2 -f s16le -i /dev/urandom -codec:a copy \
  -t 5 output
}}}
